paper_reference: Swissmetro benchmark from the pylogit Swissmetro example
notes: This is a simple research-purpose pipeline, not an industrial framework.
The questionnaire template lives in scripts/questionnaire_template.py for easy review.
Grounding is intentionally compact to avoid truncation.
Each respondent keeps one growing multi-turn conversation across all 9 questions.
The prompt directly states the persona in prose and explicitly explains GA, headway, and Swissmetro seat configuration.
